seo.title: Seedance 2.0 Video Generation | Try Seedance 2.0 Online | LazyKiwi
seo.description: Seedance 2.0 by Seed: Advanced AI video generation model. Create high-quality videos from text prompts with improved motion and visual consistency.

hero.headline: Generate **High-Quality Videos** from Text and Images
hero.tagline: Seed's multimodal AI model for controllable video generation and editing
hero.description: Seedance 2.0 transforms text prompts and reference images into consistent, high-fidelity videos. Built for creators who need precise control over motion, style, and narrative flow. Generate new footage, extend existing clips, or modify videos with natural language instructions. Supports multiple aspect ratios and extended durations for flexible content production.
hero.name: Seedance 2.0

steps.title: Three steps from idea to video
steps.description: Transform your creative vision into high-quality video content with Seedance 2.0's intuitive workflow in minutes.

items.title: Select model and describe scene
items.description: Choose Seedance 2.0 from the model library and enter your text prompt describing the video scene, action, and visual style you want to create.
items.image_prompt: Clean web interface showing Seedance 2.0 model card selected with a highlighted text input field containing a creative video prompt like 'cinematic shot of a dancer in flowing fabric, golden hour lighting'. Modern UI with purple accent colors, sidebar showing model options, main content area with prominent text box.

items.title: Configure duration and settings
items.description: Adjust video length, aspect ratio, frame rate, and motion intensity using intuitive sliders and dropdown menus to fine-tune your generation parameters.
items.image_prompt: Interface detail showing parameter controls: duration slider set to 5 seconds, aspect ratio selector showing 16:9 selected, frame rate dropdown at 24fps, motion intensity slider at medium level. Clean, organized layout with clear labels and real-time preview thumbnail.

items.title: Generate and download video
items.description: Click generate to create your video, monitor real-time progress, preview the result in the built-in player, and download in your preferred format.
items.image_prompt: Results screen showing a completed video playing in a large centered video player with playback controls. Progress bar showing 100% complete, download button with format options (MP4, WebM), and a 'Generate another' button below. Professional, polished interface design.

capabilities.title: What sets Seedance 2.0 apart
capabilities.description: Seedance 2.0 delivers production-ready video generation with advanced motion understanding, precise physics simulation, and photorealistic rendering. Built for creators who need reliable, high-quality output at scale, it handles complex scenes with natural movement and temporal consistency.

items.title: Natural movement that feels authentic
items.description: Advanced motion modeling captures realistic human gestures, facial expressions, and body dynamics. The model understands weight, momentum, and interaction physics to generate movements that look and feel natural across diverse scenarios.
bullets: Accurate human pose and gesture tracking
items.image_prompt: A dancer mid-leap in a sunlit studio, cloth flowing naturally with motion blur, realistic muscle tension and weight distribution, photorealistic lighting, dynamic movement captured with authentic physics

items.title: Stable scenes without flickering or morphing
items.description: Frame-to-frame coherence ensures objects, characters, and backgrounds remain stable throughout sequences. Advanced temporal modeling eliminates common artifacts like flickering, warping, or identity drift, maintaining visual integrity across extended clips.
bullets: No object morphing or identity drift
items.image_prompt: A person walking through a park across multiple sequential frames, maintaining consistent appearance, clothing details, and facial features, with stable background trees and coherent lighting throughout the sequence

items.title: Cinematic visuals ready for production
items.description: High-fidelity rendering delivers broadcast-quality output with accurate materials, realistic lighting, and fine detail preservation. The model handles complex textures, reflections, and atmospheric effects to produce visually compelling results that meet professional standards.
items.image_prompt: Close-up of hands crafting pottery on a wheel, with realistic skin texture, wet clay reflecting ambient light, subtle subsurface scattering, depth of field, cinematic color grading, studio lighting setup

items.title: Complex scenarios handled with precision
items.description: Deep comprehension of spatial relationships, occlusions, and multi-object interactions enables accurate generation of intricate scenes. The model reasons about depth, perspective, and context to maintain logical consistency even in challenging compositions.
items.image_prompt: Busy marketplace scene with multiple people interacting, objects passing between foreground and background, accurate depth layering, natural occlusions, diverse activities happening simultaneously, realistic spatial relationships

showcase.title: Made with Seedance 2.0 in LazyKiwi
showcase.description: From product demos to social content, creators use Seedance 2.0 to generate high-quality videos and images in minutes without complex editing software.

faq.question: What is Seedance 2.0?
faq.answer: Seedance 2.0 is Seed's AI-powered video generation model that creates high-quality videos from text prompts or images. It offers improved motion consistency, better visual quality, and longer video generation compared to the original version.

faq.question: Is Seedance 2.0 free to use?
faq.answer: Seedance 2.0 offers a free tier with limited credits for testing. Paid plans provide more generation credits, faster processing, and commercial usage rights. Pricing varies based on video length and resolution requirements.

faq.question: What's the maximum video length Seedance 2.0 can generate?
faq.answer: Seedance 2.0 can generate videos up to 6 seconds in length at high resolution. The model excels at maintaining temporal coherence and realistic motion throughout the entire clip duration.

faq.question: How does Seedance 2.0 compare to Runway Gen-3 or Luma Dream Machine?
faq.answer: Seedance 2.0 offers competitive video quality with particularly strong performance in motion realism and consistency. It provides similar resolution capabilities to competitors while focusing on natural movement and reduced artifacts in generated footage.

faq.question: How do I get started with Seedance 2.0?
faq.answer: Access Seedance 2.0 through Seed's platform by creating an account. Enter text prompts describing your desired video or upload a reference image. Adjust parameters like camera movement and style, then generate your video.

bottomCta.title: Create Your First AI Video with Seedance 2.0
bottomCta.description: Transform text prompts into cinematic videos with advanced motion control and consistent character generation. Start creating professional AI videos in minutes.

aliases.title: Other names
aliases.description: Users search for Seedance using various spellings, provider references, and feature descriptions. These aliases help you find the model regardless of how you remember its name.
